name: CTID ATT&CK → AWS Security Services Mapping
owner: Center for Threat-Informed Defense (CTID) — MITRE Engenuity
description: Mapping of MITRE ATT&CK 9.0 Enterprise techniques to AWS security service capabilities. Identifies which AWS services counter which ATT&CK techniques. Snapshot date 2021-09-21.
relationToCloudSecurity: Canonical reference for AWS-platform threat-informed defense gap analysis. Used by AWS-using security teams to map detections to ATT&CK.

license.notes: Apache-2.0 from the CTID mappings-explorer repo.

lifecycle.notes: Snapshot. Re-pull from upstream for refresh.

current_extraction.notes: Direct download of upstream-published data; no transformation applied.

notes: Pinned to ATT&CK 9.0; re-pull for newer ATT&CK versions.

desired_end_state.notes: CTID ATT&CK→AWS mapping. Apache-2.0 but upstream is the canonical source at github.com/center-for-threat-informed-defense/mappings-explorer (version-tagged). Stays a stub pointing upstream.
